0=Understands-clear comprehension
1=Usually understands-misses some part/intent of message but

communication only
3=Rarely/never understands
^=Blank(skip pattern)
92 B1000_VSN_CD B1000_VSN_CD B1000 Vision Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to see with adequate light and visual appliances, if used. -=Not
